---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open LaunchAudit
2. Run a scan
3. ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **macOS version:** (e.g., 15.2)
- **LaunchAudit version:** (e.g., 1.0.0)
- **Mac model:** (e.g., MacBook Pro M3)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the issue.

## Scan Export

If relevant, attach a JSON export of the scan results (redact any sensitive paths).

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
